name: Contextualized Evaluation of Vision Language Models through Dynamic, Multi-turn Interactions
summary: arXiv:2607.14499v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made substantial advances on benchmarks, yet their real-world effectiveness remains uncertain. This ga...
description: arXiv:2607.14499v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made substantial advances on benchmarks, yet their real-world effectiveness remains uncertain. This gap stems from the fundamental misalignment between benchmarks in controlled, static settings and the dynamic, interactive, and contextualized nature of real-world applications. To bridge this gap, we p...
author: Yijiang Li, Huiqi Zou, Bingyang Wang, Ziang Xiao
